input.tenant_message: The dryer in the laundry room on the ground floor (unit 2) has been taking two full cycles to dry a normal load, so it's basically costing double what it should. A few other residents I spoke to are having the same issue. The lint trap looks like it hasn't been cleaned in months.

ai_output.recommended_action: Dispatch maintenance to clean the lint trap and inspect the dryer exhaust duct for blockage — a clogged vent is a fire hazard and likely cause of the inefficiency. Service the dryer unit within 3 business days and establish a regular lint-trap cleaning schedule.
